messages.text:
BL-513 — Pipeline board LINKS section: list only the grid tickets, in plain alphabetical order (supersedes BL-506's most-recent-first)
What it solves: WHY A NEW TICKET, not a BL-506 amendment: the human's supersede decision arrived while BL-506
(LINKS most-recent-first, numeric-aware, all four sources) was ALREADY past the final QA gate and
integrating (QA-approved bcbae0426f, merge-up broadcast sent). An approved, integrating parcel
cannot be am…
Approval context: Carrying out your instruction to make the pipeline-board LINKS section list only the tickets shown on the board, in alphabetical order — superseding BL-506 (which had just shipped LINKS most-recent first across all link sources, so this reverses that ordering and drops the non-grid link sources). T…
BL-513 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-513" (or "reject BL-513 <reason>") to act.
